testcase.name: test_create_signal_with_default_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected signal_type=10x_action, got None assert None == '10x_action' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcb587abb180>('signal_type') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcb587abb180> = {'created_at': '2026-03-04T20:41:06.784919+00:00', 'deal_id': None, 'description': 'Test signal with default type', 'due_date': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_14_iteration_8_features.py:42: in test_create_signal_with_default_type assert data.get("signal_type") == "10x_action", f"Expected signal_type=10x_action, got {data.get('signal_type')}" E AssertionError: Expected signal_type=10x_action, got None E assert None == '10x_action' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcb587abb180>('signal_type') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcb587abb180> = {'created_at': '2026-03-04T20:41:06.784919+00:00', 'deal_id': None, 'description': 'Test signal with default type', 'due_date': None, ...}.get
